name: Moresnet
overview: Ben returns to his mysterious hometown of Moresnet after the death of his father. Together with his childhood friends, he digs up an old time capsule and discovers the diary of his psychologically disturbed brother containing a lurid prophecy: a list of names with dates of death. Within two weeks, each of them will die. Or won't they?

trailers.title: La série MORESNET pitchée par Jonas Van Geel, Jef Hoogmartens et Frank Van Passel
